{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035902DB3FEB89D8A1AA51E7C4"}"},"total":173},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606574755493987096","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书啊，从鸿钧和孽龙那本后，好久没看到这么顺畅有趣的了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771047922,"group_id":"7583946994633149465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+N7B1xoEq6C+70o4UAKBVscO9H8MF+aAhWq8jky0fdH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e45e551951184fadaa91d6f98cf8d620~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703393&x-signature=6n2Fm%2FAMzANNnXElMaLJvBzGKLE%3D","user_id":"1162618999686419","user_name":"E.T.鸭鸭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1162618999686419","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583946994633149465","book_info":{"abstract":"【幕后】+【抽象】+【群穿】+【超级缝合】 
张昊一睁眼，发现成了自己设定的洪荒天道。
本以为可以高卧九重云，执掌万古轮回，却发现这个洪荒不太对劲。
龙汉初劫，精于算计的魔祖罗睺，竟是个高喊“我命由我不由天”的穿越者，还带着个“魔道成圣系统”。
紫霄宫中，未来的道祖鸿钧，正对着刚绑定的“大圣人系统”琢磨怎么举报。
不周山下，第十三位祖巫陈天手握弑神枪，对天发誓要带巫族超脱量劫。
太阳星上，三只金乌各怀心思，一只想苟到天荒地老，一只想开枝散叶，还有一只在奋笔疾书洪荒野史。
洪荒四清、姬佬常曦、认父燃灯……
无数系统暗中潜伏，将洪荒视作掠夺本源的牧场。
张昊看着这被穿成筛子的洪荒，默默封锁了天地界壁。
“洪荒本源洪荒花，一分别想带回家。”
“你不干，有的是穿越者干！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dc6e55007c2f68d77e2428c7f7affa62","author":"飞天躺狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7583946994633149465","book_name":"洪荒：天道能处，有锅他真背","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7583947017383068185","read_count":"33284","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"607670"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"286","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/376532b2740a6d516d0fc2b4cebf82d0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307142&x-signature=XE2npgWejswmtVJBQme%2FP0sRIkM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1315472016156423","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"286"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035902DB3FEB89D8A1AA51E7C4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur
